_note: Single source of truth for native test envs; run test/gen_test_envs.py to regenerate platformio.ini.

native.desc:
Layers 4-6: transport + session + presentation + standalone parser (no app layer)
These suites predate the RFC 7230 §5.4 Host rule and feed bare HTTP/1.1
request lines to exercise parser mechanics; Host enforcement is verified
separately in env:native_compliance.

native_observability.desc:
Transport observability (DETWS_ENABLE_OBSERVABILITY): the det_conn_on_event
hook, by-reason counters, the live CONN_CLOSING gauge, and that the real lwIP
callbacks (recv FIN / error / timeout / local close / backpressure) drive the
right counter. Pure L4 core - host-tested.

native_ota.desc:
Parser streaming-body hook (OTA) - exercises http_parser with DETWS_ENABLE_OTA=1
using a mock sink (no ESP32 Update dependency).

native_prov.desc:
Provisioning form-field parser - the only host-testable part of the captive
portal (softAP / lwIP UDP / NVS are ESP32-only and compiled out here).

native_ssh.desc: SSH crypto layer (native software paths only, no mbedtls dependency)

native_ssh_hardened.desc: SSH built with password auth disabled (publickey-only hardening)

native_ssh_conn.desc: SSH wired through the real transport/session layers (PROTO_SSH byte-pump)

native_webdav_handler.desc: WebDAV request handler over a directory-capable FS mock (recursive COPY/MOVE/DELETE)

native_diag.desc:
Runtime build-flag reporter (server.diag() / DETWS_ENABLE_DIAG). The gated
diag() method + the compile-time DETWS_DIAG_JSON build-info string are enabled by
no other env, so this one keeps them compiled + exercised in CI. Reuses the full
app src via the native_app base.

native_snmp.desc:
SNMP ASN.1 BER codec (the version-agnostic base for the SNMP agent). Pure
codec - no lwIP/UDP - so it unit-tests on the host.

native_snmp_v3.desc:
SNMPv3 USM layer: auth (HMAC-SHA-256), privacy (AES-128-CFB), engine discovery,
timeliness. Pulls in the SHA-256/HMAC primitives from the SSH crypto layer.

native_telnet.desc:
Telnet server (RFC 854 IAC negotiation + line editing) wired through the real
transport ring buffer; output checked via the tcp_write capture mock.

native_coap.desc:
CoAP server (RFC 7252) message codec + resource dispatch. Pure core - no
lwIP/UDP - so it unit-tests on the host (udp_transport provides host stubs).

native_coap_observe.desc:
CoAP with resource observation (RFC 7641) enabled. Compiles + runs test_coap
with DETWS_ENABLE_COAP_OBSERVE on, so the Observe-gated code (request Observe
recording, the observer registry, coap_notify) is actually built in CI instead
of bit-rotting (it is enabled by no other env).

native_webdav.desc:
WebDAV server core (RFC 4918): method classification, header parsing, XML
escaping, and the 207 Multi-Status builder. Pure core - no FS/sockets - so it
unit-tests on the host. The FS-backed handling is HW-tested on a real LittleFS.

native_modbus.desc:
Modbus TCP slave core + RTU framing (Modbus Application Protocol): the data
model + MBAP/PDU codec + the RTU ADU codec (CRC16 + [addr][PDU][CRC]). Pure core
- the transports are ARDUINO-gated - so it unit-tests on the host from modbus.cpp alone.

native_cloudevents.desc:
CloudEvents v1.0 envelope (services/cloudevents): the structured-JSON builder
(over the JSON writer) + the binary-mode ce-* header reader. Pure host tests.

native_redis.desc:
Redis RESP2 codec (services/redis_resp): the zero-heap command encoder + the
cursor reply parser (simple/error/integer/bulk/array/nil). Pure host tests.

native_stomp.desc:
STOMP 1.2 frame codec (services/stomp): the zero-heap frame builder (command +
escaped headers + NUL body) + the non-mutating parser (command/header slices/body,
honoring content-length) + escape/unescape. Pure host tests.

native_mqtt_sn.desc:
MQTT-SN v1.2 wire codec (services/mqtt/mqtt_sn): the zero-heap message builders
(CONNECT/REGISTER/PUBLISH/SUBSCRIBE/PINGREQ/DISCONNECT/SEARCHGW) + the Length+MsgType
header parser (1- and 3-octet forms) + typed payload parsers. Pure host tests.

native_flow_export.desc:
Flow-record export codec (services/flow_export): NetFlow v5 fixed header/record
builders + the NetFlow v9 / IPFIX template-then-data cursor (length/count patching,
v9 4-octet padding). Pure host tests with wire-byte assertions.

native_protobuf.desc:
Protocol Buffers wire codec (services/protobuf): the zero-heap streaming writer
(varint / ZigZag / fixed32 / fixed64 / length-delimited) + the cursor reader, host-tested
against the spec vectors. Pure host tests.

native_wamp.desc:
WAMP messaging codec (services/wamp): the JSON-array message builders (HELLO /
SUBSCRIBE / PUBLISH / CALL / REGISTER / YIELD / GOODBYE over JsonWriter) + the positional
array parser (type / ids / URIs, nesting-aware). Pure host tests.

native_sunspec.desc:
SunSpec Modbus model codec (services/sunspec): the map writer (marker / model
headers / points / end model) + the model-chain walker + typed point readers
(u16 / i16 / u32 / i32 / string). Pure host tests.

native_c37118.desc:
IEEE C37.118.2 synchrophasor frame codec (services/c37118): CRC-CCITT, the frame
builder + Command frame, and the CRC-validating parser (type / ids / timestamp / payload).
Pure host tests.

native_dnp3.desc:
DNP3 (IEEE 1815) data-link frame codec (services/dnp3): CRC-16/DNP, the frame
builder (0x0564 header + CRC'd 16-octet data blocks) and the CRC-validating, de-blocking
parser. Pure host tests.

native_grpcweb.desc:
gRPC-Web message framing codec (services/grpcweb): the 5-octet length-prefixed
message frame builder + the 0x80 trailers frame (grpc-status / grpc-message) + the frame
parser. Pure host tests.

native_lwm2m_tlv.desc:
OMA LwM2M TLV codec (services/lwm2m): the writer (raw + int / bool / string /
float value helpers, 8-/16-bit ids, inline / 8-/16-/24-bit lengths) + the cursor reader
+ integer value decoding. Pure host tests.

native_fins.desc:
Omron FINS frame codec (services/fins): the command builder + Memory Area Read
convenience + the command / response parsers (10-octet header, MRC/SRC, MRES/SRES end
code). Pure host tests.

native_hostlink.desc:
Omron Host Link (C-mode) frame codec (services/hostlink): the FCS (XOR), the ASCII
command builder (@UU + header + text + FCS + *CR), and the FCS-validating parser +
end-code reader. Pure host tests.

native_senml.desc:
SenML (RFC 8428) pack builder (services/senml): the SenML-JSON encoder (over the
JSON writer) + the SenML-CBOR encoder (over the CBOR writer, integer labels), integral
numbers emitted as integers. Pure host tests.

native_df1.desc:
Allen-Bradley DF1 full-duplex frame codec (services/df1): BCC + CRC-16/ARC, the
frame builder with DLE byte-stuffing, and the validating, un-stuffing parser. Vectors from
AB pub. 1770-6.5.16. Pure host tests.

native_cotp.desc:
TPKT (RFC 1006) + COTP X.224 class-0 frame codec (services/cotp): the TPKT
envelope, the COTP Data TPDU + Connection Request builders, and the COTP parser. The
ISO-on-TCP foundation under S7comm / IEC 61850 MMS. Pure host tests.

native_s7comm.desc:
Siemens S7comm PDU codec (services/s7comm): the Setup Communication + Read Var
request builders, the header parser, and the response data-item reader (length-in-bits +
even padding). Constants per the Wireshark dissector. Pure host tests.

native_melsec.desc:
Mitsubishi MELSEC MC binary 3E codec (services/melsec): the batch-read request
builder (little-endian, subheader 0x5000, command 0x0401, device code + 24-bit head device)
+ the 0xD000 response parser. Pure host tests.

native_bacnet.desc:
BACnet/IP BVLC + NPDU codec (services/bacnet): the BVLC envelope (type 0x81,
function, length) + the NPDU header (version + NPCI control + optional DNET/DADR + hop
count) builders and parsers, slicing the APDU. ASHRAE 135. Pure host tests.

native_enip.desc:
EtherNet/IP encapsulation codec (services/enip): the 24-octet header, RegisterSession
+ SendRRData builders (Common Packet Format), and the SendRRData reply extractor. Constants
per the Wireshark ENIP dissector. Pure host tests.

native_amqp.desc:
AMQP 0-9-1 frame codec (services/amqp): the protocol header, the frame + method
builders, the heartbeat, and the frame/method parsers (type/channel/size/payload/0xCE).
Pure host tests.

native_cip.desc:
CIP message codec (services/cip): the EPATH logical-segment builder, the request
builders (Get_Attribute_Single), and the response parser (service / status / data). Rides
an EtherNet/IP Unconnected Data item. Pure host tests.

native_modbus_master.desc:
Modbus master codec + scanner (services/modbus/modbus_master): build read
requests, parse responses; host-tested as a round-trip against the slave codec.

native_ota_rollback.desc:
OTA rollback decision (services/ota_rollback): pure decision matrix host-tested;
the esp_ota commit/rollback are ESP32-only.

native_totp.desc:
TOTP two-factor (services/totp): HMAC-SHA1 HOTP/TOTP + base32, host-tested
against the RFC 6238 vectors (builds on the software SHA-1).

native_webhook.desc:
Webhook / IFTTT builders (services/webhook): IFTTT URL + value1/2/3 JSON payload,
host-tested. Firing is via the http_client (ESP32).

native_radio_power.desc:
WiFi radio power controls (services/radio_power): modem-sleep mode names
host-tested; the apply/readback are ESP32-only (esp_wifi).

native_dns_resolver.desc:
DNS resolver answer classifier/verifier (services/dns_resolver): host-tested;
the lwIP resolve is ESP32-only.

native_audit_log.desc:
Tamper-evident hash-chained audit log (services/audit_log). Pure - the chain is
identical on host and ESP32 - so it unit-tests on the host; SHA-256 comes from
ssh_sha256 (software path on native), the timestamp from the pluggable clock.

native_oidc.desc:
OIDC RS256 ID-token verifier (services/oidc). Pure relying-party verification -
the signature check is real RSA modexp (ssh_rsa + ssh_bignum), so it host-tests
against openssl-signed RS256 vectors with the matching JWKS public key.

native_vfs.desc:
Unified VFS wrapper (services/vfs) - host-tested through its built-in RAM
backend (the Arduino FS backend is ESP32-only and HW-verified). Pure, no heap.

native_graphql.desc:
GraphQL query subset (services/graphql) - pure parser + executor, host-tested
with a demo resolver. No heap; bounds are compile-time.

native_espnow.desc:
ESP-NOW peer messaging (services/espnow) - the envelope codec + peer registry
are host-tested here; the esp_now radio binding is ESP32-only. No heap.

native_oauth2.desc:
OAuth2 token-endpoint client (services/oauth2) - the form-body builder + JSON
token-response parser are host-tested (the parser reuses the JSON reader); the
HTTP exchange is ESP32-only. No heap, no stdlib.

native_opcua.desc:
OPC UA Binary increment 1 (services/opcua) - the type codec, UACP framing, and
Hello/Acknowledge handshake are host-tested here; the TCP server (opcua_rx) is
ESP32-only. No heap, no stdlib.

native_pentest.desc:
Adversarial / pentest harness - run SEPARATELY (`pio test -e native_pentest`),
NOT part of run_tests.sh. Fuzzes the untrusted-input parsers (HTTP, multipart,
CoAP, SNMP+BER, Modbus, CBOR, MessagePack, JSON, base64/base32) with malformed/
oversized/partial/random input and asserts bounded buffers + fail-closed + no
crash. Pairs with the live driver pentesting/detws_pentest.py. See docs/PENTEST.md.

native_keepalive.desc:
HTTP/1.1 keep-alive (persistent connections): full server built with
DETWS_ENABLE_KEEPALIVE=1; a small per-connection request cap makes the
fairness-bound test fast. Drives requests through the real transport ring +
tcp_write capture mock.

native_range.desc:
HTTP Range requests / 206 Partial Content (RFC 7233): full server built with
DETWS_ENABLE_RANGE=1, exercising serve_file() against the mock FS (now with
seek()) via the tcp_write capture mock.

native_syslog.desc:
Syslog client (RFC 5424) line formatter. Pure formatter - no lwIP/UDP - so it
unit-tests on the host (udp_transport provides host stubs for det_udp_sendto).

native_jwt.desc:
JWT (HS256) bearer-auth verification. Pure crypto/codec - reuses the SSH
HMAC-SHA-256 + base64 primitives - so it unit-tests on the host.

native_upload.desc:
Streaming file upload: POST body -> FS file via the parser streaming hook.
Small BODY_BUF_SIZE exercises multi-chunk streaming; the mock FS captures the
written bytes (test/mocks/FS.h write-capture).

native_http_client.desc:
Outbound HTTP client: URL parser + request builder + response parser. Pure
string logic (the lwIP/mbedTLS transport is ESP32-only) so it unit-tests host.

native_compliance.desc:
RFC-compliance suite: builds with all enforcement at production defaults
(DETWS_ENFORCE_HOST_HEADER=1) and exercises the strict behaviors.

native_scratch.desc:
Shared per-dispatch scratch arena (session/scratch): bump-allocate + reset
semantics, alignment, and fail-closed exhaustion. Pure host tests - no
lwIP/sockets - so it builds from scratch.cpp alone.

native_inflate.desc:
RFC 1951 INFLATE core (the WebSocket permessage-deflate decompressor). Pure
codec - no sockets - so it unit-tests on the host against zlib-generated
vectors (scratchpad/gen_vectors.py).

native_deflate.desc:
RFC 1951 DEFLATE core (the WebSocket permessage-deflate compressor). Pure codec
- no sockets - so it unit-tests on the host by round-tripping through INFLATE
(which test_inflate validates against zlib), proving the emitted streams are
valid RFC 1951.

native_ws_deflate.desc:
WebSocket permessage-deflate (RFC 7692) inbound path wired through the real WS
stack: handshake negotiation, the RSV1 frame path, and INFLATE delivery (with
the table scratch borrowed from the shared arena). Runs test_websocket with the
feature on (the deflate cases are #if-gated).

native_time_source.desc:
Multi-source time fallback matrix (services/time_source): priority-ordered
query of user time sources with first-valid-wins fallback. Pure core - no
sockets/RTC - so it unit-tests on the host with mock sources.

native_config_store.desc:
Typed NVS config store (services/config_store): string/u32/blob round-trips,
defaults, capacity, erase/clear - run against the host in-memory backend (the
ESP32 Preferences/NVS backend is compiled in only on-target).

native_device_id.desc:
MAC-derived device UUID (services/device_id): RFC 4122 v5 from a MAC via SHA-1.
Pure core - the ESP32 MAC read is ARDUINO-gated - so it unit-tests on the host
against Python uuid.uuid5 reference values.

native_auth_lockout.desc:
Per-IP brute-force auth lockout (services/auth_lockout): exponential-backoff
lockout state machine. Pure core (the millisecond clock is passed in), so it
unit-tests on the host. The enable flag is not set here (it would require
DETWS_ENABLE_AUTH); the functions and sizing constants compile unconditionally.

native_csrf.desc:
Stateless HMAC-signed CSRF token (services/csrf): issue/verify with a fixed
secret unit-tests on the host. Pulls in the SSH HMAC-SHA256 + SHA-256 core.

native_telemetry.desc:
Telemetry math (services/telemetry): moving-window stats, rate-of-change, and
totalizer. Pure computation (synthetic clock passed in), so it unit-tests on
the host.

native_net_egress.desc:
Egress-interface reporting (network_drivers/physical). The esp_netif default-
route lookups are ESP32-only; the pure interface-key classifier host-tests here.

native_partition.desc:
Flash partition-map monitor (services/partition_monitor core): the kind
classifier + JSON serializer host-test here; the esp_partition walk is ESP32-only.

native_cbor.desc:
CBOR (RFC 8949) encoder (network_drivers/presentation/cbor): a pure byte-output
codec, host-tested against the RFC 8949 Appendix A vectors.

native_msgpack.desc:
MessagePack encoder (network_drivers/presentation/msgpack): a pure byte-output
codec, host-tested against the spec encodings.

native_gpio_map.desc:
GPIO pin-mapper / browser diag core (services/gpio_map): direction names, JSON
serializer, control-POST parser, output guard - all pure and host-tested.

native_udp_telemetry.desc:
UDP telemetry line builder (services/udp_telemetry): InfluxDB line-protocol
formatting, host-tested. The UDP cast is ESP32-only (#ifdef ARDUINO).

native_guardrails.desc:
Heap/stack guardrails (services/guardrails): threshold evaluator + JSON,
host-tested. Live sampling is ESP32-only (#ifdef ARDUINO).

native_logbuf.desc: Rotating log ring + severity trap (services/logbuf): pure, fully host-tested.

native_config_io.desc:
Schema-driven config export/restore (services/config_io) over the config store;
round-trip host-tested against the in-memory backend.

native_workers.desc:
Core-partitioning invariant at N=2 (DETWS_WORKER_COUNT=2): each worker reaps
only its owned slots (check_timeouts ownership). Per-worker queue routing is
hardware-verified (the host queue mock ignores the handle).

native_codeql.desc:
CodeQL coverage env: the full app compiled with every new feature flag ON so
CodeQL traces the integration paths (CSRF / lockout / allowlist gates,
permessage-deflate) AND the new service modules, which the per-feature envs scan
only in isolation. Built (--without-testing) by the CodeQL workflow; one test
in the filter is enough to pull in the whole src set.

native_clock.desc:
Pluggable monotonic clock (services/det_clock): default millis(), custom clock
divided down to the internal 1000 Hz. Header-only, so no src to build.

native_concurrency.desc:
Concurrency proof for the cross-thread slot fields (DetAtomic state / rx_head /
rx_tail). Two threads drive one slot's SPSC ring with the production access
pattern; asserts byte-exact in-order delivery. Portable (-pthread), runs on any
host including Windows - this verifies the data integrity / logic.

native_tsan.desc:
Same harness under ThreadSanitizer: proves ZERO data races on the slot fields
(the DetAtomic acquire/release happens-before lets the plain rx_buffer[] writes
be read on the other core safely). TSan ships with clang/gcc on Linux, so this
env is run by the test CI (ubuntu); it is not buildable on the Windows host.
